title: pouteria rufa
intro: Pouteria rufa, also known as the Pouteria or Rufa, is a plant species native to Central and South America, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its bark, leaves, and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pouteria rufa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, reduce pain, and boost the immune system. Pouteria rufa is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in folk medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
